Date: 2026-04-24​

DeepSeek-V4

The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash. The model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash.

The two legacy API model names, deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner, will be discontinued. They correspond to deepseek-v4-flash.

Date: 2025-01-20​

deepseek-reasoner

  • deepseek-reasoner is our new model DeepSeek-R1.
